name: Pickled Pumpkin Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out enough pumpkin balls to measure 2 cups using a 1-inch melon-ball cutter.
2. In an enameled or stainless steel saucepan, combine 1 2/3 cups sugar, 3/4 cup cider vinegar, 1/2 cup water, 1 cinnamon stick (broken into pieces), 6 cloves, 6 whole allspice, and four 2-inch strips of lemon peel.
3. Bring the liquid to a boil over moderate heat, stirring and washing down any sugar crystals clinging to the sides with a brush dipped in cold water until dissolved.
4. Cook syrup undisturbed for 5 minutes.
5. Add pumpkin balls and simmer the mixture for 15 minutes.
6. Transfer pumpkin balls to a 1-pint jar using a slotted spoon.
7. Reduce syrup over high heat to 1 cup, pour it and spices over the balls, and let the mixture cool.
8. Chill mixture, covered, for at least 3 hours.
9. Serve chilled in a small bowl; keep covered and refrigerated for up to 1 week.
